document.source_title: Vettori explains why GT are top of IPL 2026 points table: ‘Can adapt anywhere’

claims.claim_text: Gujarat Titans can adapt to different conditions and play effectively.
claims.evidence_text: Vettori said, 'I think they can adapt to anywhere.'

entities.name: Gujarat Titans
entities.description: A cricket team in the IPL known for their strategic gameplay.
entities.evidence_text: Gujarat Titans (GT) continue to succeed by doing things their own way.

entities.name: Sunrisers Hyderabad
entities.description: A cricket team in the IPL that faced Gujarat Titans in a match.
entities.evidence_text: SRH head coach Daniel Vettori admitted his side had run into a team that not only understands conditions better than most.

events.event: Gujarat Titans vs Sunrisers Hyderabad match
events.evidence_text: That total proved too much in the end as the GT pacers produced an outstanding combined display of pace bowling to bundle SRH out for 86 runs.

metrics.name: GT score
metrics.evidence_text: Sai Sudharsan’s 61, coupled with Washington Sundar’s 50, that took the hosts to 168/7 after 20 overs.
